comments.text: I met bobby flay years ago when he visited his burger restaurant near us. Came in at 2 pm on a tuesday and my husband and I were having a day-off lunch. Bobby went straight into the kitchen, no fuss, no drama, and starting working cordially with the staff. Took pictures with them (and us!). Drew zero attention to himself. All his focus was on cooking. Really humble, great guy.
comments.author: @cometasporelcielo

comments.text: I haven't seen this man on anything in over 10 years. Seeing him still doing what he loves, makes me happy.
comments.author: @cchisolm92cc
